## nsc docker buildx status

Status information for the local Namespace buildx context.

```
nsc docker buildx status [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help            help for status
      --name string     The name of the buildx builder to check. (default "nsc-remote")
  -o, --output string   One of plain or json. (default "plain")
      --state string    If set, looks for the remote builder context in this directory.
```
